title: c5c3-operator Helm Values
description: Schema for the c5c3-operator Helm chart values

image.description: Container image configuration for the operator

tag.description: Container image tag; defaults to .Chart.AppVersion when left empty

digest.description: Optional immutable image digest; when set, the container image is rendered as repository:tag@digest so the digest (not the mutable tag) selects the image

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the operator container

limits.description: Resource limits for the operator container

requests.description: Resource requests for the operator container

namespaceScoped.description: Deploy with namespace-scoped Role/RoleBinding instead of ClusterRole/ClusterRoleBinding. Restricts the operator to its release namespace. Requires webhook.enabled=false.

leaderElection.description: Leader election configuration for high availability

enabled.description: Enable leader election for high availability

controller.description: Controller-runtime reconcile-loop tuning for the operator

maxConcurrentReconciles.description: Maximum number of CRs that reconcile concurrently (controller-runtime MaxConcurrentReconciles), rendered as --max-concurrent-reconciles. Applied by controllers that opt in; the c5c3 operator accepts the flag but does not yet consume it.

enabled.description: Enable admission webhooks for ControlPlane CR validation and defaulting

port.description: Port for the Prometheus metrics endpoint

logging.description: Operator zap logger configuration. Production defaults (development=false): JSON encoder, info level, error-level stack traces.

development.description: Enable development logging mode (--zap-devel): console encoder, debug verbosity, warn-level stack traces. Leave false for production.

level.description: Zap log level (--zap-log-level): debug, info, error, panic, or a positive integer for custom verbosity. Empty uses the mode default.

encoder.description: Zap log encoder (--zap-encoder): json or console. Empty uses the mode default.

serviceMonitor.description: Prometheus Operator ServiceMonitor settings. Requires the monitoring.coreos.com CRDs in-cluster when enabled.

enabled.description: Render a ServiceMonitor targeting the operator metrics port

interval.description: Scrape interval (Go duration: e.g., 15s, 30s, 1m, or 0 to use the global default)

create.description: Create a service account for the operator

name.description: Name of the service account; if empty and create is true, a name is generated from the fullname template

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full resource name prefix, skipping release-name prefixing

operator-library.description: Reserved values namespace for the operator-library library subchart. The library carries no configurable values; Helm injects this (empty) key during values coalescing, so additionalProperties:false at the root must permit it.
